languages.text: "Соломон, ты предлагаешь убить обоих фигурантов дела просто потому, что когда-то был похожий прецедент?"
"Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"
languages.original_text: "Соломон, ты предлагаешь убить обоих фигурантов дела просто потому, что когда-то был похожий прецедент?"

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of a similar precedent in the past?"
"Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of a similar precedent in the past?"
"Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"
"Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"
"Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"
"Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"

languages.text: "Solomorne, schlagt Ihr ernsthaft vor, beide Parteien zu töten, nur, um einen Präzedenzfall zu schaffen?"
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, schlagt Ihr ernsthaft vor, beide Parteien zu töten, nur, um einen Präzedenzfall zu schaffen?"

languages.text: « Solomorne, vous voudriez que je fasse exécuter les deux parties prenantes en vertu d'un simple précédent ? »
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"

traits.locale_text: « Solomorne, vous voudriez que je fasse exécuter les deux parties prenantes en vertu d'un simple précédent ? »

languages.text: “索罗蒙，你是想说因为有先例，所以双方的当事人都该死吗？”
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"

traits.locale_text: “索罗蒙，你是想说因为有先例，所以双方的当事人都该死吗？”

languages.text: «Solomorne, ¿está sugiriendo que ejecute a ambas partes del caso solo porque existe un precedente?».
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"

traits.locale_text: «Solomorne, ¿está sugiriendo que ejecute a ambas partes del caso solo porque existe un precedente?».

languages.text: 「ソロモーン、判例があるからというだけの理由で、両当事者を殺せと言っているのか？」
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"

traits.locale_text: 「ソロモーン、判例があるからというだけの理由で、両当事者を殺せと言っているのか？」

languages.text: "Emsal karar var diye davanın iki tarafını da öldürelim mi yani Solomorne?"
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, are you suggesting that both parties to the case be killed just because of precedent?"

traits.locale_text: "Emsal karar var diye davanın iki tarafını da öldürelim mi yani Solomorne?"
